high_concern_flags.detail: Annual CPI-W indexation mechanism that resumes after the final Amendment 2 step on 30 Sep 2026 is per Amendment 5 (2004) — first post-schedule adjustment effective 30 Sep 2027 (announced by FL Department of Commerce in mid-October 2026 after the August CPI-W release). Source: Florida Bar Journal review of Article X § 24; Ballotpedia Amendment 2; Section 448.110, F.S. Page states the mechanism with verified source.

Section 448.110, F.S. pre-suit cure window of 15 calendar days verified from the Florida Bar Journal review of the Amendment 5 implementing legislation. Liquidated-damages mechanism (equal amount to unpaid wages) and attorney's fees provisions are baseline statutory remedies. Florida Statute § 95.11(2)(d) 4-year limitations period (5 for wilful) verified from secondary sources; primary statute citation should be re-verified in the next 30-day refresh.
FL Stat § 450.081(4) 30-minute meal break for minors after 4 consecutive hours verified across multiple secondary sources; primary statute text should be re-verified in next 30-day refresh.
